summary.authoritative_rule: the add branch is now complete enough at the supervision layer; broader promotion and execution remain blocked, so the branch should stop broad tuning and shift to local residue maintenance

triage_rows.rationale: registry, seed rules, local permission hierarchy, and local slot-capacity hierarchy are already internally coherent
broader positive add still fails portability because non-seed density remains too high
single-slot fallback remains unobserved and only survives as a forced-collapse local surrogate
the branch still lacks portable permission and execution-safe capacity rules
future work should no longer be broad expansion, but only local residue maintenance unless a new portability unlock appears

interpretation: V1.34GO turns the add completion audit into the current governance verdict.

The branch should now be treated like the reduce branch was treated after its research layer stabilized: freeze the supervision mainline, keep portability and execution blocked, and stop broad tuning.
